verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hear Thy welcome voice, That calls me, Lord, to Thee, For cleansing in Thy precious blood That flowed on Calvary.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am coming, Lord, Coming now to Thee: Wash me, cleanse me in the blood That flowed on Calvary.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though coming weak and vile, Thou dost my strength assure; Thou dost my vileness fully cleanse, Till spotless all, and pure.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: ’Tis Jesus who confirms The blessed work within, By adding grace to welcomed grace, Where reigned the power of sin.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And He the witness gives To loyal hearts and free, That every promise is fulfilled, If faith but brings the plea.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All hail, redeeming blood! All hail, life-giving grace! All hail, the gift of Christ our Lord, Our strength and righteousness.
